summary: Comprehensive testing of role-based access control (RBAC) update for Rheinzelmänner app. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All RBAC features working correctly - mitglied restrictions, dark mode, settings page, statistics pages, calendar fine visibility.
seed_data_creation: Test members and users created and cleaned up automatically via pytest fixtures and UI tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC update fully tested. Key findings: 1) Backend: GET /api/fines for mitglied returns only own fines - PASSED, 2) Backend: GET /api/statistics for mitglied returns 403 - PASSED, 3) Backend: GET /api/statistics/personal returns personal stats for all roles - PASSED, 4) Frontend: Admin sidebar shows all items including Statistiken (Erweitert) - PASSED, 5) Frontend: Settings page contains Benutzerrollen section with role descriptions - PASSED, 6) Frontend: Settings page shows ICS section only for admin - PASSED, 7) Frontend: Dark mode toggle works and applies dark theme - PASSED, 8) Frontend: Calendar page hides fine badges and amounts for mitglied role - PASSED, 9) Frontend: Fines page shows 'Meine Strafeinträge' for mitglied role - PASSED, 10) Frontend: Statistics page shows 'Meine Statistiken' with personal data - PASSED, 11) Frontend: Statistics Advanced page accessible for admin/spiess/vorstand only - PASSED, 12) Frontend: /roles route redirects to /settings - PASSED. Fixed: api.js was missing getAll method for statistics (only had getByFiscalYear), added alias.

backend: GET /api/fines for mitglied role returns only own fines - PASSED
GET /api/fines for admin returns all fines - PASSED
GET /api/statistics/personal for mitglied returns personal stats - PASSED
GET /api/statistics/personal for admin returns stats - PASSED
GET /api/statistics/personal for vorstand returns stats - PASSED
GET /api/fines for vorstand returns only own fines - PASSED
GET /api/fines for spiess returns all fines - PASSED
frontend: Admin sidebar: Dashboard, Termine, Strafenübersicht, Statistiken, Statistiken (Erweitert), Administration group - PASSED
Admin sidebar: Administration contains Benutzerverwaltung, Strafenarten, Audit-Log, Einstellungen - PASSED
Settings page: Benutzerrollen section with Admin, Spieß, Vorstand, Mitglied descriptions - PASSED
Settings page: ICS-Kalender section visible for admin - PASSED
Settings page: ICS-Kalender section hidden for mitglied - PASSED
Dark mode toggle: Works and applies dark theme to Dashboard, Settings, TopBar - PASSED
Calendar page: Fine badges and amounts hidden for mitglied (canSeeFineInfo=false) - PASSED
Calendar page: Fine badges and amounts visible for admin - PASSED
Fines page: Shows 'Meine Strafeinträge' subtitle for mitglied role - PASSED
Statistics page: Shows 'Meine Statistiken' with personal data for all roles - PASSED
Statistics Advanced page: Accessible for admin - PASSED
Statistics Advanced page: Not visible in sidebar for mitglied - PASSED

test_mitglied.note: Created during UI testing, may be cleaned up

fixes_applied.issue: Missing getAll method for statistics API
fixes_applied.fix: Added getAll as alias to getByFiscalYear for backward compatibility with StatisticsAdvanced.js

notes.permission_flags: AuthContext exports: canSeeFineInfo, canSeeAdvancedStats, canManageICS, canManageMembers, canManageFines, canManageFineTypes, canManageEvents, canSeeAllFines, canManageRoles

role_restrictions.mitglied: Can only see own fines, personal statistics, no advanced stats, no ICS settings, no member management
role_restrictions.vorstand: Can see advanced stats (anonymized), manage members/events, sees own fines only
role_restrictions.spiess: Can see advanced stats (full), manage members/fines/events, sees all fines
role_restrictions.admin: Full access to all features including ICS settings and audit logs
